rule eleonore_jar2

		$string5 = "bWxEBI}Y"
		$string6 = "$(2}UoD"
		$string7 = "j%4muR"
		$string8 = "vqKBZi"
		$string9 = "l6gs8;"
		$string10 = "JavaFXTrueColor.classeSKo"
		$string11 = "ZyYQx "
		$string12 = "META-INF/"
		$string13 = "JavaFX.classPK"
		$string14 = ";Ie8{A"

	condition:
